description.value:
During your molting period, you spend weeks of study and disciplined work following a complex regimen of nutrition and exercise, stretching and sculpting the exoskeleton as it forms. As a result, you've rebuilt the protective layer over your body to be lighter and more flexible. Now, you reap the benefits of that work: your lightweight shell is still strong enough to protect you from harm, but it also makes it much easier for you to move around. The walls might still be a bit too close for comfort, but you can maneuver through them more quickly.

Your Speeds increase by 5 feet.
